title: hieracium suprafloccosum
intro: Hieracium suprafloccosum, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin issues such as eczema, acne, and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium suprafloccosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
